rationale: Elec. Code §251.007 governs timeliness of mailed election documents. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code homestead exemption amount and creates no conflict.
quote: Sec. 251.007. TIMELINESS OF ACTION BY MAIL. When this title requires a notice, report, or other document or paper to be delivered, submitted, or filed within a specified period or before a specified deadline, a delivery, submission, or filing by first-class United States mail or common or contract carrier is timely, except as otherwise provided by this title, if:
_note: No relationship between the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and this Elections Code mailing-timeliness rule.
